name: Fettuccini and Lobster Alla Pantelleria
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 6 quarts of water to a boil and add 2 tablespoons of salt.
2. Crack the lobster shells and remove the meat. Cut the tail into 1/2-inch slices and claws into 3 pieces. Set aside the tomalley.
3. In a blender, mix mint, basil, parsley, garlic, capers, tomatoes, black pepper, red pepper, and extra virgin olive oil to form a smooth paste. If needed, add a little more olive oil.
4. Pour the pesto and lobster into a large serving bowl.
5. Cook fettuccine according to package instructions until al dente, then drain well.
6. Pour hot pasta into the bowl with lobster and toss like a salad until well mixed. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
